title: phanerophlebia semicordata
intro: Phanerophlebia semicordata, also known as the cord fern, is a species of fern in the family Phanerophlebiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in the Andean region, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Phanerophlebia semicordata include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
